common.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to access this section.

login.intro: Log in to view live tasks, keep your skills updated, and coordinate practical help with the rest of the community.
login.footer: Approved volunteers get access to assignments, admin notes, and the internal workflow used to support events and local aid.
login.title: Volunteer Login
login.description: Use the email and password linked to your volunteer profile.
login.error: Failed to log in. Check your email and password.
login.passwordChanged: Password updated. Please log in with your new password.

register.intro: Join the volunteer network that helps with events, translations, logistics, and day-to-day support for the Ukrainian community in Drammen.
register.footer: Your profile is reviewed by an administrator before access is granted, so the portal stays safe and organised for everyone.
register.title: Become a Volunteer
register.description: Create your profile and we will review it before opening portal access.
register.successDescription: Your application has been received and is now pending review by an administrator. You will be able to log in once your profile is approved.

status.rejectedText: Your volunteer application is currently rejected. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the MriJa admin team.
status.pendingText: Thank you for registering, {{name}}. Your profile is currently under review by the administrators. Once approved, you will get full access to tasks, profile settings, and internal coordination tools.
status.pendingHelper: We use this step to keep the volunteer space safe and organised for everyone.

dashboard.title: Hei, {{name}}
dashboard.subtitle: Track tasks, update your availability, and coordinate with the MriJa team from one place.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Switch between your tasks, skills, and admin tools.

adminTools.title: Admin Tools
adminTools.description: Manager actions for tasks, approvals, and roles.

dashboard.unavailableDescription: Please choose one of the available workspace tabs.

tasks.title: Available Tasks
tasks.description: Choose where you can help right now and apply directly from the task card.
tasks.loadError: Unable to load tasks right now. Please try again shortly.
tasks.applyError: Failed to apply for this task. Please try again.
tasks.empty: No tasks are available right now.
tasks.myDescription: Everything you have applied for or are currently helping with.
tasks.myEmpty: You haven't applied for any tasks yet.

profile.title: Profile & Skills
profile.description: Keep your profile up to date so coordinators can match you with the right opportunities.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
profile.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
profile.passwordSame: The new password must be different from the current password.
profile.passwordUpdated: Password updated successfully. You will be redirected to login.

pending.title: Pending Approvals
pending.description: Review new volunteer registrations before granting portal access.

tasks.title: Manage Tasks
tasks.description: Create new volunteer tasks and keep the board up to date.
tasks.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

roles.title: Role Manager
roles.description: Adjust permissions for approved volunteers, managers, and admins.
roles.confirmOwnRole: You are about to change your own role. Proceed?
